decisions.reasoning: Tornadus-Therian is outsped and 2HKOed by Flutter Mane, and it cannot secure a KO. Switching into my own Flutter Mane allows me to speed tie or potentially outspeed if they lack Booster Energy, while providing a better offensive matchup.

I have a guaranteed OHKO with Shadow Ball, which is the highest priority move. Even though I am at low HP, winning the speed tie or taking the turn to secure the KO is the best play to remove the opponent's Flutter Mane.

My Flutter Mane has fainted, so I must send out a new Pokemon. Incineroar is the best pivot to handle the low-HP opposing Flutter Mane while providing Intimidate support for the rest of the opponent's team.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, and since I am faster than the opponent's likely switch-in or can secure the kill before they act, this is the optimal play to remove the threat.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, and since I am currently at 46% HP, I must take the KO now to remove the threat before it can finish me off with Wood Hammer.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is the safest pivot to handle Rillaboom's Grass-type attacks and threaten it back with Hurricane.
Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, satisfying the primary decision priority to secure the KO immediately.
Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, and since I outspeed, I can secure the knockout before Rillaboom can move, effectively removing a threat despite my low HP.
